Comment: Jointly with the Committee on Health and the Committee on Hospitals.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to requiring the department of health and mental hygiene to provide information regarding fertility treatment, including insurance coverage of fertility treatment
Items.MatterName: Requiring the department of health and mental hygiene to provide information regarding fertility treatment, including insurance coverage of fertility treatment.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to requiring health insurance coverage for pre-implantation testing for city employees
Items.MatterName: Requiring health insurance coverage for pre-implantation testing for city employees.

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, S.4400/A.4091, to require each institution within the State University of New York and the City University of New York to have at least one vending machine making emergency contraception available for purchase
Items.MatterName: Require each institution within the State University of New York and the City University of New York to have at least one vending machine making emergency contraception available for purchase. (S.4400/A.4091)

Items.Title: Resolution calling on the New York State legislature to pass, and the Governor to sign, S.5262/A.3051, legislation creating a refundable tax credit for up to three cycles of in vitro fertilization not covered by insurance
Items.MatterName: Creating a refundable tax credit for up to three cycles of in vitro fertilization not covered by insurance. (S.5262/A.3051)

Items.Title: A resolution calling on the New York State Legislature to introduce and pass, and the Governor to sign, legislation to ensure insurance companies cover the cost of Preimplantation Genetic Testing for Aneuploidies
Items.MatterName: Ensure insurance companies cover the cost of Preimplantation Genetic Testing for Aneuploidies.

Items.Title: Jointly with the Committee on Health and the Committee on Hospitals
Oversight - Access to Reproductive Health Care for New Yorkers with Disabilities.
Items.MatterName: Oversight - Access to Reproductive Health Care for New Yorkers with Disabilities.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to creating resources for doulas.
